raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom signed Assembly Bill 1845, which enables The Metropolitan Water District of Southern California to use alternative project delivery methods for water infrastructure projects.",
    "The traditional Design-Bid-Build model can hinder the construction of large and innovative infrastructure projects.",
    "AB 1845 allows MWD to use alternative delivery methods, including Design-Build and Construction Manager/General Contractor models, for water infrastructure projects.",
    "The alternative delivery methods approved by AB 1845 aim to expedite the completion of critical new water infrastructure projects and reduce their costs.",
    "The Pure Water Southern California program plans to reuse treated wastewater currently sent to the ocean, potentially producing up to 150 million gallons daily.",
    "The Pure Water Southern California program could serve more than 500,000 homes.",
    "MWD plans to mitigate drought impacts by constructing new pump stations and upgrading local water conveyance systems."
  ]
}
```
